# Investigation: slow-cluster warm-up (C4 known negative — bound recorded)

## Tests

| id | Hypothesis | Preregistered prediction | Method | Outcome | Evidence |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| T4 | H4 | majority of slow events in first third | compare timing across the window | CONTRADICTED | events fell 2/3/1 (S1 §1); adequacy: on fresh realizations of the whole 6h window a true decay fails this ~34% of the time, worst case (variants: any decay with τ ≥ 2h) |

## Conclusion

- Answer: the warm-up hypothesis is refuted.
- Per-hypothesis summary:

  | id | claim | status | basis |
  | --- | --- | --- | --- |
  | H4 | descriptive (estimand: share of slow events in first third) | REFUTED | necessary early-clustering prediction failed under T4, adequacy recorded |
